search.query:
`netflow_search_rule_20267` | fillnull value="" src_inst_id src_inst_name src_region dest_inst_id dest_inst_name dest_region transport | search src_region="" AND dest_region!="" | search nfo_hostname="$nfo_hostname$" vpc_id="$vpc_id$" (src_inst_name="$src_inst_name$" OR src_ip="$src_inst_name$") (dest_inst_name="$dest_inst_name$" OR dest_ip="$dest_inst_name$") src_port="$src_port$" dest_port="$dest_port$" transport="$protocol_name$" vpcflow_action="$action$" | `dedup_timechart_events` | bucket _time $span_token$
| eval dest_host = dest_inst_name | `format_ip_column(dest_ec2, dest_ip, dest_host)` | iplocation src_ip | stats sum(flow_count) as sumflowcount sum(bytes_in) as sumbytes by nfo_hostname,vpc_id,vpc_name,src_ip,src_host,dest_ip,dest_ec2,dest_inst_id,dest_inst_name,dest_host,transport,Country,_time

`netflow_search_rule_20267` | fillnull value="" src_inst_id src_inst_name src_region dest_inst_id dest_inst_name dest_region transport | search src_region!="" AND dest_region="" | search nfo_hostname="$nfo_hostname$" vpc_id="$vpc_id$" (src_inst_name="$src_inst_name$" OR src_ip="$src_inst_name$") (dest_inst_name="$dest_inst_name$" OR dest_ip="$dest_inst_name$") src_port="$src_port$" dest_port="$dest_port$" transport="$protocol_name$" vpcflow_action="$action$" | `dedup_timechart_events` | bucket _time $span_token$
| eval src_host = src_inst_name | `format_ip_column(src_ec2, src_ip, src_host)` | iplocation dest_ip | stats sum(flow_count) as sumflowcount sum(bytes_in) as sumbytes by nfo_hostname,vpc_id,vpc_name,src_ip,src_ec2,src_inst_id,src_inst_name,src_host,dest_ip,dest_host,transport,Country,_time
| iplocation src_ip | geostats globallimit=0 sum(sumflowcount) by Country
| iplocation dest_ip | geostats globallimit=0 sum(sumflowcount) by Country

| eval avgbits= sumbytes*8/($span_int$) | stats sum(sumbytes) as TrafficAmount sum(sumflowcount) as Connections max(avgbits) as MaxTraffic by nfo_hostname vpc_id vpc_name src_ip src_host dest_ip dest_ec2 dest_inst_id dest_inst_name dest_host Country | eval AverageSpeed=(TrafficAmount)*8/$range$ | eval TrafficSpeed=AverageSpeed/1000000 | sort - TrafficAmount | eval TrafficAmount=TrafficAmount/1024/1024 | eval MaxTraffic=MaxTraffic/1000000 | eval vpc_name_id = vpc_name ."/". vpc_id | eval src_host=src_ip ."/". src_host | eval dest_host=dest_ip ."/". dest_host | `commas_formatting(Average Mbps, TrafficSpeed, 2)` | `commas_formatting(Max Mbps, MaxTraffic, 2)` | `commas_formatting(Total Traffic MB, TrafficAmount)` | `commas_formatting(Flow Count, Connections)`
| table vpc_name_id src_host dest_host "Flow Count" "Total Traffic MB" Country | rename vpc_name_id as "VPC name/id" | rename src_host as "Source IP/Host" | rename dest_host as "Dest. IP/EC2" | rename nfo_hostname as "NFO"

| eval avgbits= sumbytes*8/($span_int$) | stats sum(sumbytes) as TrafficAmount sum(sumflowcount) as Connections max(avgbits) as MaxTraffic by nfo_hostname vpc_id vpc_name src_ip src_ec2 src_inst_id src_inst_name src_host dest_ip dest_host Country | eval AverageSpeed=(TrafficAmount)*8/$range$ | eval TrafficSpeed=AverageSpeed/1000000 | sort - TrafficAmount | eval TrafficAmount=TrafficAmount/1024/1024 | eval MaxTraffic=MaxTraffic/1000000 | eval vpc_name_id = vpc_name ."/". vpc_id | eval src_host=src_ip ."/". src_host | eval dest_host=dest_ip ."/". dest_host | `commas_formatting(Average Mbps, TrafficSpeed, 2)` | `commas_formatting(Max Mbps, MaxTraffic, 2)` | `commas_formatting(Total Traffic MB, TrafficAmount)` | `commas_formatting(Flow Count, Connections)`
| table vpc_name_id src_host dest_host "Flow Count" "Total Traffic MB" Country | rename vpc_name_id as "VPC name/id" | rename src_host as "Source IP/EC2" | rename dest_host as "Dest. IP/Host" | rename nfo_hostname as "NFO"

html.p: You see this message because there is no data for the selected Time Range or the App Setup is not completed.

This dashboard is populated by NetFlow Optimizer (NFO) Logic Module “10267: AWS Top Traffic Monitor” (syslogs with nfc_id=20267). This Module identifies AWS EC2 instances with the most traffic. It consolidates VPC Flow records over a period of time (Data Collection Interval) which all have the same combination of the following fields: Source IP address, Destination IP address, Source port number, Destination port number, Layer 3 protocol. This Module is packaged in NFO “AWS VPC Flow Logs” Module Set.
Please either change the Time Range or make sure that this NFO Logic Module is enabled. See NSO Configuration for more details.
